title: [coap] Eliminate duplicate content_format const in lichen-node
description: In lichen-node/src/dispatch.rs replace local APPLICATION_CBOR=60 with import from lichen_coap::option::content_format::CBOR or SENML_CBOR as appropriate. Reference project-LICHEN-f4xg.1
close_reason: Fixed duplicate APPLICATION_CBOR constant by importing CBOR from lichen_coap::option::content_format and updating usage in Response::content. Tests blocked by unrelated compilation errors in schc/link but change is isolated and correct.
